name: Chinese Almond Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Onion, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and skin the chicken (or for less work, slice lengthwise from a 4 oz can of deboned and skinned chicken). Remove both light and dark meat from bones and shred.
2. Sear in mixture of soy sauce, salt, cornstarch, and sherry; set aside.
3. Fry almonds or walnuts until golden in hot oil. Pour off oil and drain on paper towel.
4. Reheat pan; add 3 tablespoons oil. Saute vegetables for 1 minute. Drain off oil and set aside.
5. Heat 2 tablespoons oil; saute chicken for 1 minute. Mix in vegetables, stock, and almonds or walnuts. Simmer 1 minute.
6. Serve with rice. Serves 4 to 6 people.
